name: Gift Christmas Kuchen
recipeInstructions:
If you want to give a friend a special holiday gift,
wrap the bread in a bright ribbon. When tightly wrapped,
it freezes well for up to two months.
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Dissolve yeast and 1 teaspoon sugar in warm water.
3. Beat butter with half the sugar until light, then add
the remaining sugar as you beat it.
4. Add lemon and orange peels, mace, coriander, salt,
and yeast mixture.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition,
then milk.
6. Gradually add flour (about 1/2 cup at a time) until
a soft dough forms.
7. Turn the dough into an oiled plastic bag or bowl,
seal, and let rise at room temperature until doubled,
about one hour.
8. Turn out dough onto a floured surface, punch down,
and shape into two rectangular loaves.
9. Place loaves on greased baking sheets.
10. Brush tops with melted butter.
11. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise in a warm place
until doubled, 30-40 minutes.
12. Bake for 30-45 minutes until golden brown and cool
on a rack.
13. Remove the paper strips and replace them with bright ribbons.
Makes 2 loaves.
